generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100System : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical system consisting of MABI MAX 100 serial robot with six axes"
    base:contains MABIMAX100Motor, MABIMAX100Gearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DController
]

instance MABIMAX100Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor in MABI MAX 100 motor components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance MotorSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensor in MABI MAX 100 motor components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSpeedData
]

instance GearboxTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in MABI MAX 100 gearbox components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxTemperatureData
]

instance ControllerStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Status sensor in Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerStatusData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionSensor
]

instance MotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
]

instance GearboxTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxTemperatureSensor
]

instance ControllerStatusData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerStatusSensor
]

instance MotorPositionRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from MABI MAX 100 motor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler
]

instance MotorSpeedRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw speed data from MABI MAX 100 motor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler
]

instance GearboxTemperatureRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from MABI MAX 100 gearbox components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler
]

instance ControllerStatusRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw status data from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerStatusData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes real-time, data-driven representations of robot joint behavior through live-data linking to maintain continuous synchronization between physical and digital components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle stages encompass the development phase where modeling is structured across multiple abstraction levels including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers. Methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are employed to manage complexity and transition between these abstraction layers during system development."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system implements Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and streams data via MQTT protocol for integration with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates industry standards such as SysML for system modeling, AADL and ACME for architecture description, MontiArc for component-based modeling with behavior specification via Automaton or state machines, and utilizes MathWorks Simulink for simulation. Methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are applied to manage system complexity across abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical layers), ensuring compliance with MBSE practices and interoperability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and a physical safety cell is implemented to restrict the working range of the robotic system."
]
